overall.description: Gameplay footage from a racing game (Forza Horizon 5) showing first-person driving on a rural highway through hilly Mexican terrain. The player overtakes slower traffic including a silver BMW SUV, navigating winding roads with scattered vegetation and power lines under a bright sunny sky.

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed along a winding rural highway through increasingly green and forested terrain. The road features guardrails and stone walls in sections, with pine trees lining the hillsides as the camera navigates gentle curves through the open landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed drive along a rural highway that transforms from an arid, brown scrubland into a lush, forested landscape. It begins with the camera accelerating past a silver sedan on a cracked asphalt road flanked by dry hills and scattered vegetation. As the pace slows, the camera trails a silver BMW SUV carrying a green surfboard before surging forward to overtake it on the left. The scene then shifts as the terrain becomes increasingly green, passing a blue car heading in the opposite direction while the road begins to wind. Finally, the camera navigates gentle curves through a verdant environment of pine trees, stone walls, and guardrails under a bright sky.
